title: Cinematic Ultra Realistic Sunset Scene Overlooking Glowing
sourceTitle: Cinematic Ultra Realistic Sunset Scene Overlooking Glowing
prompt: A cinematic, ultra-realistic sunset scene overlooking a glowing city by a calm river. A young man with messy dark hair sits on the edge of a rooftop ledge, wearing a black hoodie, dark pants, and white sneakers. He rests his chin on his hand in a thoughtful pose, gazing at the horizon. Beside him sits a small cat, also looking out over the city. The sky is filled with dramatic orange, red, and purple clouds as the sun sets, casting warm reflections on the water below. Birds fly across the sky in silhouette. A single hanging Edison bulb glows softly above, adding a cozy aesthetic. Tree branches frame the scene from the side. The atmosphere is peaceful, introspective, and slightly melancholic. Highly detailed, soft lighting, depth of field, 4K, cinematic color grading, volumetric lighting.
